mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_address_modify ( order_id, user_id, shop_id, old_name, old_phone, old_detail, new_name, new_phone, new_detail, status, expire_time ) VALUES ( #{address.orderId}, #{address.originalReceiverName}, #{address.originalReceiverPhone}, #{address.originalDetailAddress}, #{address.currentReceiverName}, #{address.currentReceiverPhone}, #{address.currentDetailAddress}, 1, NOW() + INTERVAL 3 HOUR )
mapper.select: SELECT order_id, user_id, shop_id, old_name, old_phone, old_detail, new_name, new_phone, new_detail, status, expire_time, create_time FROM order_address_modify WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT order_id, user_id, shop_id, old_name, old_phone, old_detail, new_name, new_phone, new_detail, status, expire_time, create_time FROM order_address_modify WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT order_id, user_id, shop_id, old_name, old_phone, old_detail, new_name, new_phone, new_detail, status, expire_time, create_time FROM order_address_modify WHERE order_id IN
#{orderId}
